Module com.lulow.justtype
Package com.lulow.justtype.model.particles

Class ParticleAdapter

java.lang.Object
com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.ParticleAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
IParticle
Direct Known Subclasses:
AshParticle, ConfettiParticle
public abstract class ParticleAdapter extends Object implements IParticle
Default adapter for IParticle. Holds common position and render fields; subclasses override update logic.
